viewMode.label: View
viewMode.description: Choose the layout for displaying the bookmark list.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose the color theme for the app.

realtimeSync.label: Sync
realtimeSync.description: Set the direction of real-time sync with Chrome bookmarks.

chromeImport.label: Chrome Import
chromeImport.description: Import bookmarks from Chrome browser into the app.

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the app.

sync.label: Real-time Sync
sync.warning: ⚠ Depending on sync settings, Chrome bookmarks may be deleted. We recommend exporting your Chrome bookmarks first ({{path}}).

off.label: No Sync
off.description: Automatic sync between Chrome bookmarks and app is disabled.

chromeToWeb.label: Chrome → Web
chromeToWeb.description: Chrome bookmark changes are automatically reflected in the app.
chromeToWeb.warning: ⚠ Bookmarks deleted in Chrome will also be permanently deleted in the app.

webToChrome.label: Web → Chrome
webToChrome.description: App bookmark changes are automatically reflected in Chrome bookmarks.
webToChrome.warning: ⚠ Bookmarks deleted in the app will also be permanently deleted in Chrome.

bidirectional.label: Bidirectional
bidirectional.description: App and Chrome bookmarks sync automatically in both directions.
bidirectional.warning: ⚠ Deleting from either side permanently deletes from both.

chromeImport.title: Import Chrome Bookmarks
chromeImport.description: Import bookmarks from your current Chrome browser into the app. Existing URLs will be skipped.

folder.name: Name
folder.deleteConfirm: Delete this folder? Subfolders and bookmarks will also be deleted.

bookmarkList.loadError: An error occurred while loading bookmarks
